query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `production_documents` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `moId` int NOT NULL, `tab` varchar(32) NOT NULL, `docType` varchar(128) NOT NULL, `fileName` varchar(512) NOT NULL, `mimeType` varchar(128), `fileSize` int, `fileKey` varchar(512) NOT NULL, `fileUrl` varchar(1024) NOT NULL, `uploadedBy` varchar(128), `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `production_documents_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`));
